text.title: AI Incident Postmortem Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this primarily an ML failure (not pure infra)?

branch.when: ml_failure == true AND root_cause_class != null AND eval_guard_addable == true

conclusion.verdict: Author full postmortem; ship with named eval-guard and updated golden set version.

branch.when: ml_failure == true AND root_cause_class != null AND eval_guard_addable == false

conclusion.verdict: Author postmortem; document why no guard is possible (e.g. requires real-time labels not available).
Escalate to ML lead — root cause not yet identified.
Use DevOps postmortem template instead; this template's ML axes don't apply.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
